# Stage 3: Link Existing Component

Use this form when the **model component is already registered** and you only
need to link it to a new combination of horizontal and vertical computational grids.

This creates a **component configuration** record only — no new component is registered.
The resulting config ID (e.g. `ocean_nemo-v3-6_h101_v103`) is used in Stage 4 (Model).

> [!NOTE]
> If the component you need is **not** in the list below, use
> [Stage 3: Model Component](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml)
> to register it first.

---

label: Model Component
description:
Select the already-registered component you want to link to grids.

<details markdown="1">
<summary>Detailed Guidance</summary>

**Registered model component**

Choose the component from the list. It must already exist in the EMD registry.
If it is not listed here, submit a
[Stage 3: Model Component](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml)
issue first, then return to this form.

</details>

label: Horizontal Grid
description:
The horizontal computational grid (h###) this component configuration uses.

<details markdown="1">
<summary>Detailed Guidance</summary>

**Horizontal grid reference**

Select the h### ID registered in Stage 2a. Leave as 'Not specified' only
for components with no horizontal dimension (e.g. 1D column models).

</details>

label: Vertical Grid
description:
The vertical computational grid (v###) this component configuration uses.

<details markdown="1">
<summary>Detailed Guidance</summary>

**Vertical grid reference**

Select the v### ID registered in Stage 2b. Leave as 'Not specified' only
for components with no vertical dimension (e.g. 2D surface models).

</details>

---

## What happens after submission

- The config ID is derived as `<component>_<h###>_<v###>`
- If that ID **already exists** on `src-data`: the issue is closed immediately with a link to the existing file
- If it **does not exist**: `component_config/<config_id>.json` is pushed to `src-data` and the issue is closed
- Use the config ID in Stage 4 (Model / source_id)
- [Track your submissions](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues?q=is%3Aissue%20author%3A%40me)
